project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: The working target is a repeatable Web-console-first OSDCloud deployment flow that deploys Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW and boots directly to the custom Windows account desktop (configured in the Web UI during initialization) with no human interaction inside OOBE.

development.purpose: Active repository workspace for code, docs, tests, local commits, and setup validation.

host_management.purpose: Installed host-management bundle used by the deployment host after setup.

host_state.purpose: Mutable host-only state including local config, secrets, and staging after setup.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root selected in Web initialization; never located inside the Git clone.

development.summary: Refactored from hardcoded davis account to dynamic windowsUsername/windowsPassword configured in Web UI initialization. pxeinstallPassword auto-generated as 24-char alphanumeric. Built-in Administrator disabled by SID -500. Renamed Invoke-DavisOobe.ps1 to Invoke-OobeCustomization.ps1.

baseline.subject: fix: support optional trailing comments on server IP assignment in Start-OSDCloud-iPXE.ps1

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web project-root selection, Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
forbidden: Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit the Web-selected deployment project root.
Do not commit generated deployment artifacts or local secrets.
Do not write deployment runtime files back into the Git clone.

recent_changes.summary:
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.12.
- Bundled precise boot.wim sync fingerprinting, legacy fallback, docs, and regression coverage.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools\osdcloud-console\test\windows.test.js; npm test; PowerShell parser check for tools\Set-OsdCloudIpxeEndpoint.ps1

recent_changes.summary:
- Replaced boot.wim sync mtime checks with WinPE input fingerprints and drift categories.
- Added marker schema v2, legacy fallback, docs update, and regression coverage.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools\osdcloud-console\test\windows.test.js; npm test; PowerShell parser check for tools\Set-OsdCloudIpxeEndpoint.ps1

recent_changes.summary:
- Deduplicated PATH refresh in Setup-DeploymentServer.ps1 to avoid Windows environment-length overflow.
- Added a regression test covering a bloated inherited PATH during setup prerequisite checks.

- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.11.
- Kept installSequence-only custom script ordering changes and legacy read compatibility in the same delivery batch.

- Removed phase/defaultPhase from new profile editing and published manifests.
- Restored read compatibility for legacy script catalog/profile metadata so preloaded items still render.
